author: Shams Charania
raw_content: BREAKING: LeBron James has informed the Los Angeles Lakers he will play elsewhere for the 2026-27 season, Klutch Sports CEO Rich Paul tells ESPN. James has not yet decided where he'll play next.

author: Shams Charania
raw_content: LeBron James is now an unrestricted free agent. Rich Paul says he has spoken with 27 teams. James wants to play meaningful, competitive basketball at his next stop, sources say.

author: Shams Charania
raw_content: The Giannis Antetokounmpo trade to the Miami Heat is complete. Miami acquire the two-time MVP in a blockbuster reshaping the Eastern Conference.

author: Chris Haynes
raw_content: Rich Paul named the New York Knicks, Philadelphia 76ers and Boston Celtics among teams of interest for LeBron James on the Game Over podcast this week.

author: Fabrizio Romano
raw_content: Sandro Tonali to Tottenham, here we go and confirmed. Full agreement reached with Newcastle on a £100m deal, contract until 2031. Medical booked, documents being signed.

author: Sky Sports News
raw_content: DONE DEAL: Tottenham have completed the £100m signing of Sandro Tonali from Newcastle United, a club record. The Italy midfielder has signed a five-year contract.

author: Fabrizio Romano
raw_content: Jurgen Klopp to become the new Germany manager, here we go. Agreement reached with the DFB, he replaces Julian Nagelsmann. Deal to be signed in the coming days.

author: Shams Charania
raw_content: Teams are recruiting LeBron James via voice memos sent to Rich Paul. Philadelphia may be gaining an edge, with Sixers ownership figure Bob Myers appearing on Paul's podcast.

author: David Ornstein
raw_content: EXCL: Julian Alvarez has informed Atletico Madrid he wants to leave this summer, with Barcelona his preferred destination. Atletico value him at around €150m and point to his €500m release clause. #AFC among those monitoring.

author: David Ornstein
raw_content: EXCL: Bruno Guimaraes informs Newcastle of wish to leave & join Arsenal. #AFC ready to offer up to £60m at present but no club-to-club contact yet + #NUFC still not entertaining bids for the 28yo.

author: Ben Jacobs
raw_content: Bruno Guimaraes has already verbally agreed personal terms with Arsenal. Club-to-club talks are the next step, and Newcastle have so far received nothing formal.

author: Guillem Balague
raw_content: Barcelona have already had a €100m bid for Julian Alvarez turned down. The complication: Atletico are extremely reluctant to sell one of their best players to a direct La Liga rival.

author: Ben Jacobs
raw_content: Enzo Fernandez's camp have explored a summer exit from Chelsea, with Real Madrid showing interest. Early stage, but the Argentina midfielder's future is one to watch.

author: Chris Haynes
raw_content: Stephen Curry, at a celebrity golf event, acknowledged the allure of teaming up with LeBron James and said he'd pitch the Warriors' winning environment. Golden State pushing.

author: Fabrizio Romano
raw_content: On this day in 2014. Some things you never forget. 🇩🇪 7-1 🇧🇷

author: Fabrizio Romano
raw_content: Understand Real Madrid's earlier proposal for Julian Alvarez was also rejected, and the player does not fancy a move to the Bernabeu. Madrid now focusing on a defender. Real, as things stand, are out of the Alvarez race.

author: NBA Buzz Central
raw_content: 🚨🚨 LEBRON TO THE KNICKS IS 100% DONE 🚨🚨 Signing tomorrow, our sources confirm it!! HERE WE GO 🔵🟠 RT to be first!!

author: Ben Jacobs
raw_content: Arsenal have made fresh contact over Julian Alvarez. Sporting director Andrea Berta is pushing, and crucially Atletico are far more willing to sell abroad than to Barcelona or Real. Arsenal see a genuine opening.

author: Fabrizio Romano
raw_content: Arsenal planning to offer around €90m for Bruno Guimaraes. Newcastle do not want to sell and are asking well in excess of £100m. No formal bid submitted yet.

author: Shams Charania
raw_content: Summer League: No. 1 pick AJ Dybantsa drops 28 in Las Vegas as the Jazz roll. Standout night for the rookie class.

author: Sky Sports News
raw_content: Arsenal are pushing to finalise a deal for Julian Alvarez before pre-season begins on 20 July, per reports. Sticking point: Arsenal reluctant to go beyond £90m, Atletico holding out for north of £100m.

author: David Ornstein
raw_content: Xabi Alonso has made clear publicly he wants Enzo Fernandez to stay at Chelsea and views him as central to the project. A firm message amid the Real Madrid speculation.

author: Guillem Balague
raw_content: Those close to Julian Alvarez insist his preference has not changed: he wants Barcelona and is willing to wait while they sort the finances. The player's desire is still to join Hansi Flick's project.

author: Sky Sports News
raw_content: FULL TIME: Argentina 3-1 Switzerland. Julian Alvarez settles a tight World Cup quarter-final with a stunning extra-time long-range winner. Argentina march on.

author: Fabrizio Romano
raw_content: Understand Atletico Madrid have told Julian Alvarez's camp: they will negotiate with Arsenal, but they will NOT sell to Barcelona. Relations between the clubs are strained. Arsenal now firmly in the picture.

author: Shams Charania
raw_content: ESPN insiders list six finalists for LeBron James: 76ers, Cavaliers, Heat, Nuggets, Warriors and Timberwolves. No decision yet; James is prioritising a competitive roster.

author: Fabrizio Romano
raw_content: Bruno Guimaraes to Arsenal. Player side the desire is clear and personal terms no issue. But Newcastle want £90m and Arsenal do not want to pay it. Talks stalling, still no formal bid.

author: Transfer Zone HQ
raw_content: 🚨🚨 ALVAREZ TO ARSENAL IS DONE 🚨🚨 Medical booked for Monday, full agreement, our sources say 100% happening. HERE WE GO 🔴⚪️ RT!!

author: Fabrizio Romano
raw_content: Enzo Fernandez: understand there is no bid from Real Madrid and Chelsea's stance is clear, he is not for sale. As things stand a move away this summer looks unlikely.

author: Fabrizio Romano
raw_content: Julian Alvarez: as it stands, no bid accepted and the most realistic outcome remains him staying at Atletico this season, unless Barcelona solve their finances or Arsenal meet the valuation. Still open.
